name: Olive Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Olive oil, plus additional for brushing muffin tins
3 tablespoons Fresh mint, chopped or 2 teaspoons Dried mint, crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Rinse the olives and drain them.
3. Dry the olives on paper towels.
4. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients, adding baking powder last.
5. Brush muffin cups with oil and dust with flour (do not use paper baking cups).
6. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes, or until golden brown and serve warm.
Variation: The recipe can also be baked in 9x5 inch loaf pans; increase the baking time by 15 minutes.
